song.title: Pass Me Not
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Pass me not, O gentle Savior, Hear my humble cry; While on others Thou art calling, Do not pass me by.
[C] Chorus Savior, Savior, Hear my humble cry; While on others Thou art calling, Do not pass me by.
[V2] 2) Let me at Thy throne of mercy Find a sweet relief; Kneeling there in deep contrition, Help my unbelief.
[V3] 3) Trusting only in Thy merit, Would I seek Thy face; Heal my wounded, broken spirit, Save me by Thy grace.
[V4] 4) Thou the Spring of all my comfort, More than life to me; Whom have I on earth beside Thee? Whom in heav’n but Thee?
song.author: Fanny J. Crosby
